    11	export interface ShiroEditorProps
    12	  extends Omit<RichEditorProps, 'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes' | 'actions'> {
    13	  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
    14	  actions?: ReactNode
    15	}

    18	  extraNodes,

    26	  )
    27

    25	import type { RichEditorProps } from '../types'
    26	import { ContentEditable } from './ContentEditable'
    27	import { clsx, getVariantClass } from './utils'
    28	
    29	export function RichEditor({
    30	  initialValue,
    31	  onChange,
    32	  variant = 'article',
    33	  colorScheme = 'light',
    34	  placeholder = 'Write something...',
    35	  onSubmit,
    36	  autoFocus = false,
    37	  className,
    38	  contentClassName,
    39	  actions,
    40	  onEditorReady,
    41	  extraNodes,
    42	  rendererConfig,
    43	  debounceMs,
    44	  children,
    45	}: RichEditorProps) {
    46	  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes
    47	  const initialConfig = {
    48	    namespace: 'RichEditor',
    49	    theme: editorTheme,
    50	    nodes,
    51	    editable: true,
    52	    onError: (error: Error) => {
    53	      console.error('[RichEditor]', error)
    54	    },
    55	    ...(initialValue ? { editorState: JSON.stringify(initialValue) } : {}),
    56	  }
    57	
    58	  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, colorScheme)
    59	
    60	  return (
    61	    <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={colorScheme}>
    62	      <RendererConfigProvider config={rendererConfig} mode="editor">
    63	        <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
    64	          <div className={clsx('rich-editor', variantClass, className)}>
    65	            <RichTextPlugin
    66	              contentEditable={
    67	                <ContentEditable
    68	                  className={contentClassName}
    69	                  placeholder={placeholder}
    70	                />
    71	              }
    72	              ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
    73	            />
    74	            <HistoryPlugin />
    75	            <ListPlugin />
    76	            <LinkPlugin />
    77	            <TabIndentationPlugin />
    78	            <TablePlugin />
    79	            <MarkdownShortcutsPlugin />
    80	            <OnChangePlugin onChange={onChange} debounceMs={debounceMs} />
    81	            <SubmitShortcutPlugin onSubmit={onSubmit} />
    82	            <ImagePlugin />
    83	            <KaTeXPlugin />
    84	            <AlertPlugin />
    85	            <MermaidPlugin />
    86	            <ComponentPlugin />
    87	            <AutoLinkPlugin />
    88	            <EditorRefPlugin onEditorReady={onEditorReady} />
    89	            {autoFocus && <AutoFocusPlugin />}
    90	            {children}
    91	            {actions && <div className="rich-editor__actions">{actions}</div>}
    92	          </div>
    93	        </LexicalComposer>

    13	type Page = 'editor' | 'nodes' | 'presets' | 'diff'
    14	
    15	export function App() {
    16	  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState<Page>(() => {
    17	    const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    18	    return hash === 'nodes' || hash === 'presets' || hash === 'diff'
    19	      ? hash
    20	      : 'editor'
    21	  })
    22	
    23	  useEffect(() => {
    24	    const handleHashChange = () => {
    25	      const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    26	      const validPage =
    27	        hash === 'nodes' || hash === 'presets' || hash === 'diff'
    28	          ? hash
    29	          : 'editor'
    30	      setCurrentPage(validPage)
    31	    }
    32	
    33	    window.addEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    34	    return () => window.removeEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    35	  }, [])
    36	
    37	  const navigate = (page: Page) => {
    38	    window.location.hash = page
    39	  }
    40	
    41	  return (
    42	    <DialogStackProvider>
    43	      <div className="app">
    44	        <header className="app-header">
    45	          <div className="app-header-content">
    46	            <div>

    48	              <p className="app-subtitle">
    49	                Lexical-based rich text editor & renderer
    50	              </p>
    51	            </div>
    52	            <nav className="app-nav">
    53	              <button
    54	                className={
    55	                  currentPage === 'editor'
    56	                    ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
    57	                    : 'nav-tab'
    58	                }
    59	                onClick={() => navigate('editor')}
    60	              >
    61	                Editor
    62	              </button>
    63	              <button
    64	                className={
    65	                  currentPage === 'nodes' ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active' : 'nav-tab'
    66	                }
    67	                onClick={() => navigate('nodes')}
    68	              >
    69	                Node Showcase
    70	              </button>
    71	              <button
    72	                className={
    73	                  currentPage === 'presets'
    74	                    ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'

    77	                onClick={() => navigate('presets')}

    81	              <button

    97	          {currentPage === 'diff' && <DiffPage />}

     9	export function TldrawPlugin() {

     9	}
    10	
    11	export const TldrawRenderer: FC<TldrawRendererProps> = ({
    12	  snapshot,
    13	  onSnapshotChange,
    14	}) => {
    15	  const isEditable = !!onSnapshotChange
    16	
    17	  if (isEditable) {
    18	    return (
    19	      <TldrawEditorCanvas
    20	        snapshot={snapshot}

    23	    )
    24	  }
    25	
    26	  return <TldrawReadOnly snapshot={snapshot} />
    27	}
    28	
    29	// Read-only: uses TldrawImage component for static SVG rendering
    30	const TldrawReadOnly: FC<{ snapshot: string }> = ({ snapshot }) => {
    31	  const [TldrawImageComponent, setTldrawImageComponent] =
    32	    useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
    33	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    34	  const [error, setError] = useState('')
    35	
    36	  useEffect(() => {
    37	    import('tldraw')
    38	      .then((mod) => {
    39	        setTldrawImageComponent(() => mod.TldrawImage)
    40	        setLoading(false)
    41	      })
    42	      .catch((err) => {
    43	        setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load tldraw')
    44	        setLoading(false)
    45	      })
    46	  }, [])
    47	
    48	  if (loading) {
    49	    return <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
    50	  }
    51	
    52	  if (error || !TldrawImageComponent) {
    53	    return <div className={css.tldrawError}>{error || 'Failed to load'}</div>
    54	  }
    55	
    56	  let parsedSnapshot: Record<string, any> | undefined
    57	  try {
    58	    const parsed = JSON.parse(snapshot)
    59	    if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object') {
    60	      parsedSnapshot = parsed
    61	    }
    62	  } catch {
    63	    return <div className={css.tldrawError}>Invalid snapshot data</div>
    64	  }
    65	
    66	  return (
    67	    <div className={css.tldrawContainer}>
    68	      <TldrawImageComponent snapshot={parsedSnapshot} format="svg" />
    69	    </div>
    70	  )
    71	}
    72	
    73	// Interactive editor for edit mode
    74	const TldrawEditorCanvas: FC<{
    75	  snapshot: string
    76	  onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void
    77	}> = ({ snapshot, onSnapshotChange }) => {
    78	  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    79	  const [TldrawComponent, setTldrawComponent] = useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
    80	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    81	  const initialSnapshotRef = useRef(snapshot)
    82	
    83	  useEffect(() => {
    84	    import('tldraw').then((mod) => {
    85	      setTldrawComponent(() => mod.Tldraw)
    86	      setLoading(false)
    87	    })
    88	  }, [])
    89	
    90	  const handleChange = useCallback(
    91	    (editor: any) => {
    92	      try {
    93	        const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
    94	        onSnapshotChange(JSON.stringify(doc))
    95	      } catch {
    96	        // ignore serialization errors
    97	      }
    98	    },
    99	    [onSnapshotChange],
   100	  )
   101	
   102	  if (loading || !TldrawComponent) {
   103	    return <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw editor...</div>
   104	  }
   105	
   106	  let snapshotProp: Record<string, any> | undefined
   107	  try {
   108	    const parsed = JSON.parse(initialSnapshotRef.current)
   109	    if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object') {

   111	    }
   112	  } catch {
   113	    // start with empty canvas
   114	  }
   115	
   116	  return (
   117	    <div ref={containerRef} className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   118	      <TldrawComponent
   119	        snapshot={snapshotProp}
   120	        onMount={(editor: any) => {

   122	            scope: 'document',
   123	          })
   124	        }}
   125	      />
   126	    </div>
   127	  )
   128	}
